[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001101001 4
1 001011010 4
2 110111010 6
3 111101101 7
4 011111011 7
5 110101111 7

7 111101011 7
